query: WITH RECURSIVE descendants(id, depth) AS ( SELECT id, 0 FROM blocks WHERE id IN (SELECT value FROM json_each(?1)) UNION ALL SELECT b.id, d.depth + 1 FROM blocks b INNER JOIN descendants d ON b.parent_id = d.id WHERE d.depth < 100 ) UPDATE blocks SET deleted_at = NULL WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM descendants) AND deleted_at IS NOT NULL
